title: aegilops crassa subsp. trivialis
intro: Aegilops crassa subsp. trivialis is a plant species within the wild wheat grass family, scientifically known as Aegilops crassa subsp. trivialis, and is considered a hardy perennial grass that grows in the wild. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aegilops crassa subsp. trivialis include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant can be dried and used as a tea or made into capsules to take advantage of its potential medicinal properties.
